basic_details.job_title: NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur (NIT Jamshedpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Adhoc Faculty Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 22-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Adhoc Faculty recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, email application procedure, and direct links to the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate in relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's level.
qualification.details: Adhoc Faculty: Doctorate in relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's level.

salary_details.details: Rs.70000/-Per month (Consolidated) for candidates with Ph.D. degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Jamshedpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Jamshedpur Adhoc Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Adhoc Faculty position at NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the Adhoc Faculty position at NIT Jamshedpur is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Adhoc Faculty at NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Adhoc Faculty position at NIT Jamshedpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Adhoc Faculty post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Doctorate in a relevant discipline with first-class marks (60% or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's levels.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Adhoc Faculty position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered for the Adhoc Faculty position is Rs. 70,000/- per month for candidates holding a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for the Adhoc Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to send their duly filled application form in a single PDF file via email to the Head of the Department.

faq.question: Q6. What is the email address for submitting the application?
faq.answer: The application should be emailed to HOD Email: [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is there a walk-in interview for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a walk-in interview is scheduled as part of the selection process for the Adhoc Faculty positions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the date of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Adhoc Faculty positions will be conducted on 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITJSR/CD/2026/1179.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Jamshedpur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur is located in Jamshedpur, Jharkhand.
